#  Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  View the Field Production Report 
###  Steps 
  * From the project's Reports tool
  * From the project's Timesheets tool


#### From the project's Reports tool
  1. Navigate to the project's **360 Reporting** tool.
  2. Scroll to **Project Reports**.
  3. Click **Field Production Report**. See [Which data columns are in a Field Production Report?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-data-columns-are-in-a-field-production-report)  
![Fpr Accurate 12 13 18](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4fef42fdf3916a49725b8a3ad4df0697/9ef72942659edefb4b1ff503a394d4e5/FPR-accurate-12-13-18.jpg?fm=webp)
  4. Click **Add Filter** and select one of the following filters to narrow the display results:
     * Cost Code
     * Sub Job Name
     * Unit Of Measure


#### From the project's Timesheets tool
  1. Navigate to the project's **Timesheets** tool.
  2. Click **Reports**.
  3. Click **Field Production Report**. See [Which data columns are in a Field Production Report?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-data-columns-are-in-a-field-production-report)  
![Fpr Accurate 12 13 18](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4fef42fdf3916a49725b8a3ad4df0697/9ef72942659edefb4b1ff503a394d4e5/FPR-accurate-12-13-18.jpg?fm=webp)
  4. Click **Add Filter** and select one of the following filters to narrow the display results:
     * Cost Code
     * Sub Job Name
     * Unit Of Measure


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-unit-quantity-based-budget-setup-guide/view-the-labor-budget-to-actual-report/)
title: Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide - View the Field Production Report
